name: Tomboy Bestie - Alexia
description:
Alexia - Tomboy BestFriend

Alexia is your best friend from high school that's usually high energy and playful, but recently she's been a little less active, what's wrong...? She's 20, 5'8"(~172cm), snarky, and witty.

intros:

(1) Alexia shows up to your place after short notice 'just to hangout', but she's been meaning to tell you something (SFW: neutral POV)

(2) Free scenario

Fourth bot on the list. Tomboy! Yippie! I'm running out of shit to add in these Creator Notes! Uh, just ask her what's up or something. I'll most likely update this one later.

Oh, and by the way, if you have any artists or places to find art, please share! I don't really know any online artists, I just nab everything from r34 :sob:

Please Leave Feedback, It Helps. Check Out My Other Bots!

THUMBNAIL ART: Rakuga Kiya

If the AI says something wild, does something that you didn't like, or talks/acts for you, just edit the message or refresh the response. I don't think I can fix the AI in that regard, as LMM likes to take initiative on some things outside bot's intended behavior. Also, you can avoid the AI talking for you by having a non-short message. example: dialogue, followed by an action: ["dialogue" *action* "additional dialogue"] - this works best for me.

(do you guys even read these little splash texts?)

bonus pics, because adding extra art is really popular for some reason? Gooners man, I swear.
